name: Beef Stew Burgundy
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Jones Crazy salt Mrs. Dash Original blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine wine, beef bouillon cubes, and bite-size stir-fry beef in a crockpot set to High.
Cook for 1 hour.
2. Add crushed tomatoes, tapioca, sugar, bay leaves, Jones Crazy salt Mrs. Dash Original blend,
carrots cut into chunks, potatoes cut into chunks, frozen peas, and onions (or frozen mixed vegetables) to the crockpot.
Stir and mix well.
3. Cook in a crockpot on High for 6-8 hours until tender.
4. Remove bay leaves before serving.
5. Serve over rice, biscuits, or as stew with a fresh-made loaf of Italian bread.
